source_question: Steen, Todorov, and Turowska, Question 4.13(i) in *Local Operator Multipliers and Positivity* (arXiv:1206.3889), ask whether a continuous Schur multiplier always admits continuous bounded ell^2 factors. Arhancet's *Dilations of Markovian Semigroups of Measurable Schur Multipliers* (arXiv:1910.14434) answers the positive version and predicts a negative answer to part (i).
source_title: Dilations of markovian semigroups of measurable Schur multipliers
